vehicle.cab_type: high-roof sleeper cab (visual interpretation only—no explicit text)
vehicle.camera_height: low, at or below grille level

composition.truck_orientation: facing forward, slight turn to truck's left
composition.important_crop_information: entire cab and front wheels are visible; lower part of the bumper and the right side of the tractor are slightly cropped. No trailer is visible.

company_identity.position: top of cab, roof-mounted sign, centered
company_identity.appearance: white uppercase text bordered in black, with two small Dutch flags (red, white, blue stripes) on either side of 'DUTCH', flanked by astronaut mascot figures at corners

owner_signatures.text_or_element: DUTCH COMMANDER roof sign including Dutch flags and mascot figures

roof_lights.position: roof, arranged in a symmetrical horizontal row above windshield under the roof sign, with slight gaps between each; 4 on left, 1 center, 2 on right relative to truck's center

grille_lights.position: integrated into grille, lower front central area

bumper_lights.position: left and right sides of the bumper, outer corners

main_headlights.position: on each side of the front fascia, below the grille

front_geometry.grille_description: three horizontal grille bars with integrated design, central large MAN badge, angular frame
front_geometry.headlight_description: main headlights are angular, wraparound style with separate LED elements inside housing, position lights/turn signals integrated
front_geometry.bumper_description: multi-piece lower bumper with modern aerodynamic styling, features 2 outer integrated fog/auxiliary lights, black and silver color separation
